name: Pepper Slaw
recipeIngredient: 12 Sweet green peppers, cored and chopped
12 Sweet red peppers, cored and chopped
recipeInstructions:
1. The day before preparing the slaw, pass all vegetables through a coarse blade of a meat grinder.
2. Sprinkle the vegetables with salt and mix well.
3. Let the mixture stand overnight.
4. The next day, drain off any excess juice from the vegetables.
5. Add mustard seed, celery seed, and sugar to the drained vegetables, mixing well.
6. Stir in vinegar until just covered.
7. Pack the slaw into hot, sterilized jars and seal immediately.
8. Store in a cool place; the slaw will keep for one year.
